← Work

Desert Retreat

Concept studies · AlUla · 2025 Concept study

In the desert, architecture is listening before it is building. The volumes sit low, turn with the wind, and take the colour of the ground — the house becomes a continuation of the dune, not its guest.

Location
AlUla
Year
2025
Category
Concept studies
Status
Concept study
Services
Architectural concept · Passive climate study

The brief is simple: a majlis, a living and dining space, two bedrooms, and an outdoor fire court. The volumes gather around a narrow shade corridor that catches the night breeze and sheds the day's heat.

Thick earthen walls store the cool of the night, and openings are small and deep, framing the landscape rather than consuming it. The study is part of the studio's ongoing research into desert-climate architecture.

The images above are atmosphere and material references by Unsplash photographers, part of a temporary sample presentation. Image credits.
